headline: Datadog FedRAMP High Win Puts Government Growth Story In Focus
summary: Datadog has received FedRAMP High certification for its observability and security platform, clearing it for highly sensitive U.S. Federal Government workloads. The certification places Datadog among a limited group of vendors approved for critical government use across civilian and defense agencies. This development expands Datadog’s access to public sector projects that require elevated security and compliance standards. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:DDOG, this certification comes as...
